text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whew. Breathing exercises, finished! Thanks for
waiting, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm all ready to win today!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna place well this time. Heck, I'll even get
first!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, for me, it's child's play. You think so too,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Good. That's what I like to hear, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All fired up, Tokai Teio heads toward the track.
